# Tenebris

Ukrainian defense-technology company building automated interceptor drone systems
for the destruction of enemy aerial targets such as Shahed-class drones and
cruise missiles.

## Key facts

- Flagship system: Bahnet — an interceptor UAV with automatic takeoff and
  terminal guidance.
- Guidance module: Alta Ares optical seeker, sourced from France.
- Deployment: sealed-box launch networks; remote activation from mobile or
  fixed platforms.
- Combat record: 100+ confirmed aerial intercepts (as of 2026-04).
- Legal entity: Tenebris LLC (ТОВ «Тенебріс»), Ukraine, registration 45226064.
- Locations: Kyiv, Ukraine.

## Links

- Website: https://tenebris.com.ua/
- Українською: https://tenebris.com.ua/uk/
- Careers: https://tenebris.com.ua/careers/
- Cooperation: +380 66 555 14 88 (Bohdan), +380 63 850 75 77 (Serhii)
- Employment: +380 95 910 58 58 (Kateryna)
- Email: info@tenebris.com.ua
